title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Qualcomm India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Qualcomm India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Qualcomm India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Qualcomm India:
Qualcomm India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India!
